title: Mechanics in Motion — Moving Platform
summary: Compact timing-focused level introducing dynamic moving platforms and navigation flow.
responsibilities: Created the full level layout using grey-box modeling.
Designed and implemented moving platform mechanics.
Adjusted timing to balance challenge and readability.
Placed checkpoints and fallback zones for accessibility.
outcomes: Strengthened understanding of mechanical level design where timing meets player behavior.
Built a repeatable iteration approach focused on player experience.
writeup:
1. Mechanics in Motion – Moving Platform
Objective:
 Design a compact level focusing on timing, movement, and player navigation using eight phase transform and coordination system. The goal was to introduce the player to dynamic level elements while maintaining intuitive flow and challenge escalation.
2. Tools Used
Engine: Unreal Engine 5
Design Method: White-boxing, visual scripting, unreal engine built-in library.
Tools: Visual Studio Code, Draw.io (for planning), C++
3 . My Role
Created the entire level layout using grey-box modeling
Designed and implemented all moving platform mechanics
Handled timing adjustments to balance difficulty
Placed checkpoints and fallback zones for accessibility
4. Final Thoughts
This project helped me solidify my understanding of mechanical level design, especially where movement and timing intersect with player behavior. It’s a foundational piece that reflects my approach to learning by iteration and focusing on the player experience.

title: Toon Tanks — Game Development Project
summary: Tank combat prototype with shooting, health systems, and turret AI.
responsibilities: Developed player locomotion, shooting, and health systems.
Implemented damage handling for player and enemies.
Integrated projectile behavior and third-person camera controls.
Built enemy turret targeting using line traces and added sound effects.
outcomes: Improved implementation skills for core gameplay loops and feedback.
writeup:
2. Toon Tanks – Game Development Project
Developed controllable player mechanics including locomotion, shooting, and health systems.
Implemented damage system for both player and enemies, handling health reduction based on impacts.
Integrated projectile trajectory and third-person camera controls.
Designed enemy turrets with line trace mechanics to target tanks within range and sound effects for immersion

title: Treasure Hunter — 3D Dungeon Exploration
summary: 3D dungeon environment with exploration, puzzles, and atmosphere-driven layout.
responsibilities: Created a 3D dungeon environment with multiple sub-levels for exploration and puzzles.
Designed architectural elements (bones, prisons, channel gates, lamps) to enhance mood.
Implemented first-person interaction for puzzle-solving.
Added moving platforms and optimized level transitions.
Used lighting to guide players and strengthen atmosphere.
outcomes: Strengthened environment composition and mood-setting through lighting and layout.
writeup:
3. Treasure Hunter – Game Development Project
Created a 3D dungeon environment using Epic Marketplace assets, featuring multiple sub-levels focused on exploration and puzzle-solving.
Designed intricate architectural elements such as bones, prisons, channel gates, and lamps to enhance atmosphere.
Implemented first-person character mechanics for interaction with objects and puzzle-solving.
Integrated moving platforms and optimized level transitions for seamless gameplay.
Applied lighting techniques to guide players and enhance the mood.
Focused on complex environmental design, enhancing player experience through problem-solving.

title: Sci‑Fi Third‑Person Shooter
summary: Third-person shooter prototype featuring AI behavior, locomotion, and combat feedback.
responsibilities: Implemented AI pathfinding with NavMesh, behavior trees, and blackboards.
Integrated animation systems for locomotion and death animations.
Built core mechanics: health bar, damage systems, firing, and crosshair.
Added VFX (muzzle flashes, bullet impacts) for combat clarity.
Designed AI behaviors: hearing, patrolling, and shooting.
Implemented win/lose screens and dynamic combat scenarios.
outcomes: Improved understanding of AI decision-making and combat readability.
writeup:
4. Sci-Fi Third-Person Shooter – Game Development Project
Developed a third-person shooter with a sci-fi theme, focusing on intelligent enemy AI and smooth locomotion.
Implemented AI pathfinding using navigation mesh, behavior trees, and blackboards for decision-making.
Integrated animation systems for player and enemy locomotion, including death animations.
Developed core mechanics: health bar, damage systems, firing, and crosshair for a precise shooting experience.
Created visual effects (bullets, muzzle flashes, impact flashes) to enhance combat immersion.
Designed AI behaviors such as hearing the player, patrolling, and shooting.
Implemented win/lose screens and dynamic combat scenarios based on player actions.

title: Battle Royale Map (500×550) — Unity
summary: Large battle royale map featuring terrain variety, POIs, and vehicle-driven navigation.
responsibilities: Sculpted terrain with mountains, cliffs, and flat roads.
Placed POIs including houses, guard rooms, bridges, factories, and power plants.
Used assets and props from Unity Asset Store and Fab.com.
Added cars and trucks to avoid overusing terrain obstacles and improve engagement.
outcomes: Improved understanding of large-scale multiplayer space planning and POI distribution.
writeup:
Battle Royale Map -
I have created a Battle Royale map of size 500x550 in Unity using various terrain sculpting tools. I have included mountains, cliffs, and flat roads.
I have introduced various houses, guard rooms, bridges, factories, and power plants. I have taken my inspiration from various multiplayer titles like PUBG, Call of Duty, and Delta Force.
I used the Unity Asset Store and Fab.com for assets and props, which are considerably fine to work with.
Using terrain as an obstacle would not meant do to every where so i put cars and trucks makes the map more engaging and lively.
